name: Single filer at median income (MXN 300,000/year)
description: Employee earning MXN 300,000 annually (~MXN 25,000/month, approximately USD 14,600). Above subsidy threshold, subject to full ISR and IMSS.

sources.description: Calculated using 2026 ISR annual table from SAT Annex 8. ISR bracket: 21.36% on excess above MXN 210,403.70.
